rules: If webhook configured: receive push notification on task_stopped event.
If API task: poll task.listMessages for structured MPR result.
Only search if latest pointer is missing or corrupt.

latest_mpr_json.notes: Canonical fast path. Always read first.

bus_outbox_pointer.notes: BUS outbox — MPR placed here after completion.

manus_webhook_push.notes: Push notification when MPR ready. Requires public HTTPS endpoint. Excellent for last-mile.

manus_api_task_listMessages.notes: Poll task messages for MPR content. Use structured_output_schema for JSON result.

git_fetch_direct.notes: Reliable fallback. Read MPR directly from GitHub.

manual_paste.notes: Human pastes MPR to ChatGPT. Current operational bridge.
